_README: Tracking state for the brand sweep on the brand-discovery branch. Updated as each brand is processed.

completed.notes: POST per country. Required new post_per_country engine strategy.
wpgmza REST markers. Borderline: 701 raw → 483 normalized; city 0%, country 54%, phone 0%. Upstream data is mashed.
Same backend as Rolex (retailers.tudorwatch.com). Cloned rolex_retailers with brand=TDR. Required type:viewport to enable expansion.
SFCC backend. country_filter via worldwide_country_pagination. data_path: stores.stores. Likely template for other Swatch Group brands.
Algolia stores index. Reused post_per_country with {country} templated inside the params filter string. Search-only API key is public.
Custom country UUIDs (mapped via country_id_map). Required new inject_country_field engine option. unit=99999 returns all stores per country in one call.
SFCC. First attempt timed out on every country — Akamai requires a full browser User-Agent. Fixed by adding custom_headers.
Stockist.co SaaS. Uses radius_search expansion. Stockist is multi-tenant — expect to clone this for several smaller brands by swapping the map_<tenant> ID.
Richemont brand. Static JSON at /network/boutiques...json. No auth needed.

blocked.reason: Nuxt SPA with GraphQL behind query-specific hash (__gqlh). Can't discover the query name + hash without browser. Store data not embedded in SSR HTML.
blocked.fix_estimate: Would need browser automation or the exact query name + hash from DevTools.

blocked.reason: Shares the same Seiko API (same key, same country IDs, same 2507 stores). Grand Seiko dealers are already covered by the seiko_stores config. Would need the Grand Seiko collection_id to filter — low priority since the physical stores overlap completely.
404 on Panerai-style JSON path. Different Richemont backend.
blocked.fix_estimate: Needs DevTools to find actual endpoint.

blocked.reason: 404 on Panerai-style JSON path. Different Richemont backend.
Swatch Group but NOT on Tissot SFCC pattern. /en-us/stores?countryCode=US returns 404.
Swatch Group but NOT on Tissot SFCC pattern. /en-us/stores?countryCode=US returns 404.

ASP.NET WebForms postback. Store data is rendered into HTML by Storelocator.aspx after __doPostBack on country/city dropdowns. No JSON XHR feed (the GetViewportInfo XHRs are Google Maps tile metadata, not store data). Would require __VIEWSTATE/__EVENTVALIDATION management + per-country + per-city HTML parsing.
blocked.fix_estimate: half-day of engine work; defer until 2+ similar brands surface

blocked.reason: Laravel/Phoenix backend with X-CSRF-TOKEN required on every request. Routes /api/search/stores and /api/search/store/locator return HTTP 500 without session cookies + CSRF token from /api/xhr/ping. Markers on the boutiques page are loaded via XHR but obscured by analytics noise; the route is gated on session state.
blocked.fix_estimate: 30-60 min for a session-aware engine helper. Worth building if 2+ Richemont brands (IWC, Panerai) use the same pattern.

blocked.reason: Brand has no store locator at all (direct-to-consumer / no retail partners). Nothing to scrape.

Magento 2 GraphQL backend proxied through a frontend mesh (Platform.sh). The /graphql endpoint returns 404 when called from outside — only reachable through the app's server-side proxy with session context. Internal endpoint: magento.longines.com.c.od5p7chjmqn7q.ent.platform.sh/graphql (SSL cert mismatch when called directly).
blocked.endpoint_seen: https://www.longines.com/graphql (POST, Magento GraphQL with store: en_us header)
blocked.fix_estimate: Would need browser automation or a way to proxy through the frontend session.

blocked.reason: Proprietary LPE (Luxury Product Experience) Nuxt SPA on store.rado.com. Algolia only indexes 'subdivisions' (geographic autocomplete), not stores. All curl probes return the same HTML shell. No SSR state (__NUXT__ empty), no data-lat attributes, no discoverable API endpoint. Store data loads dynamically via internal JS mechanisms after user interaction.
blocked.endpoint_seen: https://store.rado.com (Nuxt SPA), Algolia app 0knemtbxx3 index=subdivisions only
blocked.fix_estimate: Would need browser automation (Playwright/Puppeteer) to intercept the runtime fetch, or reverse-engineer the LPE platform API from minified JS bundles.

blocked.reason: HTML response with .swa-store-view__store divs (data-latitude/data-longitude attrs). Radius-capped at ~150 miles (huge radius returns 0). 12 stores per call. Would need country iteration + multi-point radius grid + HTML parser. ~1-2h engine work, marginal ROI: Swarovski is mostly fashion, watches are a side product.
blocked.fix_estimate: 1-2h; revisit if 2+ similar HTML+radius brands surface
